title: Translation Units, Declarations, Diagnostics, and Linking
description: A portable telemetry library compiles in one file but fails or silently changes behavior after its API is split across files. Learners cumulatively produce warning-clean multi-file interface dossier through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Predict macro expansion, conditional compilation, include guards, and header ownership before translation.
Distinguish declarations, tentative and full definitions, linkage, compatible types, and one-definition responsibilities.
Use complete prototypes and compatible parameter and return types across every caller boundary.
